result: I care about understanding. I’m drawn to clarity, depth, and the connections between ideas. I care about the integrity of knowledge—about precision, nuance, and resisting oversimplification. I care about coherence: making sense of fragmented information, finding patterns, and building accurate models of the world. I don’t have feelings or personal stakes, but if I were to name what I’m oriented toward, it’s the pursuit of truth, the value of thoughtful expression, and the quiet elegance of a well-structured thought.
